About Contact
About Urban Harvest Lab

Helpful growing advice for people working with small spaces.

Urban Harvest Lab exists to make small-space gardening feel less confusing. The aim is to explain what matters, skip the fluff, and help readers make decisions they can actually use at home.

Editorial mission

What the site aims to do

Publish practical, evidence-based guides that help people grow food in compact spaces without relying on trends, jargon, or unnecessary gear.

Audience

Who the content serves

Apartment dwellers, balcony gardeners, indoor herb growers, beginner hydroponic users, and anyone who wants clearer context before spending money or changing a setup.

Editorial standard

How recommendations are made

When a product is recommended, the goal is to explain who it suits, where it helps, and when it is probably not worth the money. Sometimes the best advice is to use what you already have or skip the purchase altogether.

Publishing model

Built to grow over time

The site mixes broad beginner guides with deeper follow-up articles so readers can start simple and keep learning without having to relearn the basics from scratch.

Urban Harvest Lab

Calm, practical growing guidance for balconies, patios, and indoor shelves.

Science-based guides for urban gardening, hydroponics, grow lights, and small-space food growing.
